info.title: BackroomsGPT Final API
info.description: BackroomsGPT FINAL: live canon-aware lore retrieval plus bounded Atlas research, project workflow, media research, source discovery, and release evals. Live source data remains authoritative for current lore; Atlas is an indexed research layer.

get.summary: List registered Backrooms lore sources
Probe registered source health

parameters.name: source_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated source IDs; omit for core sources.

get.summary: Search one registered source
Fetch a page from one registered source

parameters.name: max_chars
parameters.description: Use a compact excerpt unless the user explicitly needs more.

parameters.name: allow_archive_fallback
parameters.description: False by default for current-fact questions. Enable only when historical archive material is appropriate.

get.summary: Search across separate Backrooms sources
Resolve an uncertain lore title and fetch the best candidate

parameters.name: allow_archive_fallback
parameters.description: Enable only if a labeled historical archive result is useful.

get.summary: Compare a concept across separate canons with compact records

parameters.name: max_chars_per_source
parameters.description: Compact comparison budget per source; fetch individual pages only when deeper detail is necessary.

parameters.name: allow_archive_fallback
parameters.description: False by default. Enable only when a clearly labeled historical archive comparison is explicitly wanted.

get.summary: Get recent pages across configured sources
Build a bounded live page-link graph
Search Liminal Archives before fetching uncertain titles
Fetch a resolved Liminal Archives page

parameters.name: allow_archive_fallback
parameters.description: Archive data is historical and must remain labeled.

get.summary: Search a public Fandom hostname supplied by the user
Fetch a public Fandom page

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page title. The legacy title parameter is not used by v21 Actions.

get.summary: Search a public Wikidot hostname supplied by the user
Fetch a public Wikidot page
Read a supported public Fandom or Wikidot URL
Hybrid search over the selectively indexed Atlas corpus

post.summary: Resolve and persist one live lore page in Atlas
post.description: Persistent write. Call only when the user explicitly asks to index material or authorizes a project workflow that needs it.

post.summary: Persist a bounded set of recent pages in Atlas
post.description: Persistent, potentially expensive write. Use only on explicit user or operator request.

get.summary: Get Atlas coverage and bounded telemetry statistics
Compare the newest two stored snapshots of an indexed page
Get bounded stored graph relationships for an indexed page
Search Wikimedia Commons for relevance-ranked media candidates

post.summary: Create a retained Writer Project with a per-project access capability
post.description: Persistent write. Call only after the user explicitly asks to create a project and understands that its returned access capability is required later.

get.summary: Read a Writer Project using its access capability

parameters.name: X-Project-Access-Token
parameters.description: Per-project capability returned at creation. Never expose it in normal prose.

patch.summary: Update a Writer Project and optionally set its stage
patch.description: Persistent write. Use only after a user asks to save a specific project change.

delete.description: Destructive persistent action. Call only after an explicit deletion request.

post.summary: Advance a Writer Project to its next stage
post.description: Persistent write. Use only after the user asks to move to the next workflow stage.

post.summary: Run bounded Atlas overlap research for a Writer Project
post.description: Persistent write because research is saved to the project. Call only when the user asks to save project research.

get.summary: Get a Writer Project readiness checklist

post.summary: Discover candidate Fandom and Wikidot hosts from a bounded safe seed
post.description: Persistent candidate write. Call only when a user explicitly asks for discovery; candidates are never automatically trusted or promoted.

post.summary: Safely probe one discovered candidate without promoting it
post.description: Protected, bounded reachability and HTML probe only. It never changes candidate status and never adds a candidate to the source registry. Use only after the user explicitly asks to check a discovered candidate.

post.summary: Run the bounded BackroomsGPT acceptance regression suite
post.description: Persistent eval-history write and potentially expensive live work. Use only for explicit release validation, never normal user research.

BackroomsGPTWriteKey.description: Service-level Custom GPT Action credential. It authorizes protected service operations but is not a user identity or a Writer Project capability.

Search.description: Search hits; fetch a full page before making important claims.

Page.description: Fetched page with source provenance and archive state.

Resolve.description: Resolved candidate and fetched page, with alternatives and attempts.

Compare.description: Compact separate canon records, not a merged canon.

AtlasSearch.description: Hybrid Atlas ranking results; scores are not duplication proof.

ProjectCreate.description: Created project and one-time access capability.

CandidateProbe.description: Bounded candidate reachability probe; success does not approve or register the candidate.

Unauthorized.description: A valid service Bearer credential is required.

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found or its capability was invalid.

RateLimited.description: Operation rate or concurrency limit reached.

Unavailable.description: Source or protected operation is temporarily unavailable.

project_access_token.description: Return once; required for later project actions.

allow_archive_fallback.description: False by default. Enable only when the user explicitly wants clearly labeled historical archive material indexed.
